title: Exam Tactics and Next Steps
description: How to read AIF-C01 questions, handle the newer question types, manage time, and put together a short study plan.

lessons.title: Reading Questions and Handling the New Formats
objectives: Spot service-to-use-case keywords that point to the answer
Approach ordering and matching questions methodically
Manage time and never leave a question blank

lessons.title: A Study Plan and Resources
objectives: Sequence prep by domain weight, with hands-on Bedrock/PartyRock
Use official AWS resources and timed practice
Decide when you're ready to book
